description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a soft, blush-pink upholstered seat and backrest with a geometric, tufted pattern. The seat and back are contoured for ergonomic comfort, with a gentle curve that supports the lower back and hips. The chair is supported by a sturdy, black metal central column that branches into five legs, each ending in a smooth-rolling caster for easy mobility. The base and casters are made of metal and hard plastic, providing stability and durability. There are no armrests, giving the chair a minimalist and open appearance. A visible lever beneath the seat suggests adjustable height functionality.
description: A blush-pink, tufted swivel chair with a contoured seat and back, black metal base, and five rolling casters. It has no armrests and features a visible height adjustment lever.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, contoured seat and backrest with geometric tufting and no armrests.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the ergonomic curve of the seat and back, as well as the visible height adjustment lever under the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, slightly rounded backrest and the central support column branching into five legs.
description_view_3: Left-side view emphasizes the seat's depth, the backrest's contour, and the five-legged base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, cylindrical metal column with a telescoping mechanism for height adjustment, connecting the seat to the five-legged base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, gently curved backrest with geometric tufting, medium height, upholstered in blush-pink fabric, and no cutouts.
